utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: (1) health_coverage: required 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'—the plan lists physical and mental health insurance with specific plan names and monthly costs; it also adds a preventive care package with a monthly cost. This satisfies the requirement. (2) property_coverage: required 'home/contents insurance with costs'—the plan lists 'home_content_insurance' with a plan name and €95/month; this satisfies the requirement. (3) travel_coverage: required 'travel insurance with costs'—the plan lists a travel insurance plan with €115/month; this satisfies the requirement. (4) additional_services: required 'any enhancement services with costs'—the plan lists multiple services each with costs (monthly and one-time); this satisfies the requirement. (5) total_budget: required 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown'—the plan provides monthly cost and one-time costs; it does not provide annual cost, but the wording allows monthly/annual, so monthly alone can satisfy 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown.' Therefore, all 5 items are included and sufficiently specified with costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each item in the final coverage plan to the exact item names in the ground-truth ratings and return their ratings. The final plan includes: HealthFirst Standard Plan for physical health insurance (exists under primary_health_coverage.physical_health with rating 7), HealthFirst Standard Plan for mental health insurance (exists under primary_health_coverage.mental_health with rating 6), a Preventive Care Package (exists under health_enhancement_services as Preventive Care Package with rating 8), EliteHome Premium Coverage (exists under property_protection.home_content with rating 10), PrimeTravel Premium Plan (exists under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance with rating 10), Family Therapy Coverage (exists under health_enhancement_services with rating 8), Insurance Portfolio Management (exists under general_services with rating 9), and Claims Advocacy Service (exists under general_services with rating 8).
